thinks.think: A handmade book rests on a floral-tiled surface. It features a dark grey cover with white swirls and purple pages with white dots. A red ribbon ties the book, with three markers extending from the right edge. The background shows light tiles with large white flowers and brown leaves. The scene remains static.

The handmade book remains stationary on the floral-tiled surface. Its dark grey cover with white swirls and purple pages tied by a red ribbon are unchanged. Three red ribbon markers protrude from the right edge. The background of light tiles with large white flowers and brown leaves persists. The scene is static with no visible movement or lighting changes.

Two hands enter the frame to interact with the stationary book. The left wrist wears a silver watch, while the right wrist has a thin red band. The right hand grasps the red ribbon tie on the purple pages, beginning to untie the bow, while the left hand stabilizes the book's left edge.

The hands continue untying the red ribbon bow on the purple pages. The right hand pulls the ribbon loop away from the center, loosening the knot significantly. The left hand maintains grip on the book's edge. The red ribbon strands extend outward as the bow structure collapses.

Two hands manipulate the loose red ribbon strands over the purple pages. The hands cross the ribbon ends horizontally in the center and begin tying a knot. The left wrist displays a silver watch, and the right wrist has a thin red band. The ribbon transitions from a loose state to being crossed and knotted.

Two hands complete tying the red ribbon horizontally across the purple pages. The knot is tightened in the center, securing the book closed. The hands adjust the ribbon's tension, pulling the ends taut against the decorated surface.

Two hands manipulate the red ribbon horizontally. The right hand pulls the ribbon rightward, sliding the right purple flap to reveal a white vertical strip and a crescent moon design. The left hand holds the book steady.

The hands open the book flaps to reveal a new page. A central purple square containing a large white circle and white dots is displayed on a pink and white striped background. The hands hold the bottom corners of the opened book, presenting the artwork clearly against the floral tiled surface.

Hands hold a white card displaying vertical blue text reading HAPPY BIRTHDAY along the side margins. The center features a purple square with white dots and a circle. The floral tiled surface remains visible underneath. The card is fully extended for display.

Hands fold the white birthday card inward, hiding the blue text and central circle. The book closes to reveal the original purple flaps with white dots. A loose red ribbon lies horizontally across the front cover. The hands press down on the closed book, resting on the floral tiled surface.

Hands open the book to reveal black pages with white dots. The left page features pink flaps, including hearts tied with red ribbon. The right page displays a large white heart with a red bow and a red rectangular flap with mirrored white text. Small white hearts decorate the black background.

The open scrapbook reveals black pages decorated with white dots. The left page contains pink flaps, while the right page features a large white heart with a red ribbon and a red rectangular label with mirrored white text reading "I LOVE U". Hands hold the bottom corners of the pages, keeping the book flat against the floral tiled background.

On the right page, the hand pulls a tab on the red rectangular label, sliding out a rainbow-colored strip with block letters underneath. The left page features pink flaps tied with ribbon. The black pages are decorated with white dots throughout the spread.

The right hand pushes the rainbow-colored slider strip back inside the red rectangular pocket labeled with mirrored white text on the right page. The left hand stabilizes the black page decorated with white dots and pink heart flaps. The floral tiled surface remains visible beneath the open scrapbook as the interactive element retracts.

The right hand pulls a white card mechanism downwards from the right page, revealing a cascade of small red hearts and vertical text reading "Happy Birthday". The left page remains static with pink heart flaps against the black background. The floral tiled surface is visible underneath the open scrapbook.

The right hand pushes the white card mechanism back up, hiding the vertical "Happy Birthday" text and red hearts. This reveals the red "I LOVE U" slider pocket below the large white heart with a red bow on the black background, while the left page remains static with pink heart flaps.

The open scrapbook rests on floral tiles. The right hand reaches toward the large white heart cutout on the black right page, grasping the red ribbon bow attached to its center. The fingers manipulate the ribbon. Below, the red slider with 'I LOVE U' text is visible, while the left page featuring pink heart flaps remains stationary.

Hands pull the large white heart cutout on the right page upwards, unfolding it to reveal a flower-shaped card. This layer displays the text "You Make Me Happy" alongside drawings of a cup and a heart, while the left page with pink heart flaps remains stationary on the floral tiled surface.

Hands hold the unfolded flower-shaped card steady above the right page, displaying the text 'You Make Me Happy' and illustrations. The left hand touches the top petal while the right hand supports the edge. The underlying black scrapbook page with the red 'I LOVE U' slider remains visible below the card.

Hands maintain the white flower-shaped card in an open position above the right page, revealing the text "You Make Me Happy" and illustrations. The left hand presses near the center text while the right hand holds the edge. The red "I LOVE U" slider and black page remain visible below on the floral tiles.

Hands fold the white flower-shaped card closed, bringing the red heart cover back into view over the black page. The text "You Make Me Happy" is obscured as the petals are tucked inward. The left page with pink heart flaps remains stationary on the floral tiled surface below.

Hands place and adjust a red flower-shaped paper cutout onto the right page, covering the previous white heart design. The red petals are spread flat against the black background, while the red "I LOVE U" slider pocket remains visible at the bottom. The left page featuring pink heart flaps remains unchanged.

Hands wearing a silver watch and red band adjust the cutout to reveal a white flower shape with "I LOVE U" text on a petal, replacing the previous red flower design. The red slider pocket labeled "I LOVE U" remains visible at the bottom of the right page, while the left page featuring pink heart flaps remains stationary on the floral tiled surface.

Hands manipulate a flower-shaped cutout on the right page, turning it to display a red side after previously showing a white side with text. The red "I LOVE U" slider remains visible below, while the left page featuring pink heart flaps stays stationary on the floral tiled background throughout the action.

Hands adjust a red flower-shaped paper cutout on the right page, spreading its petals over the black background. A white layer is visible underneath. summary.text:
[0-4] A handmade book with a dark grey cover featuring white swirls and purple dotted pages rests on floral tiles, tied with a red ribbon and three side markers.
[4-8] Hands enter; the left wrist wears a silver watch, the right a red band. The right hand unties the central red ribbon bow while the left stabilizes the book.
[8-12] The hands cross the loose ribbon strands horizontally and tie a knot, tightening it to secure the book closed.
[12-14] The right hand pulls the ribbon rightward, sliding the right purple flap to reveal a white vertical strip and a crescent moon design.

[14-18] Hands hold the bottom corners while opening purple flaps with white dots to reveal a white card featuring vertical blue text reading HAPPY BIRTHDAY along the side margins and a central purple square with a white circle on a pink and white striped background. [18-20] The card is folded inward, closing the book to display the purple flaps and a loose horizontal red ribbon against the floral tiled surface. [20-24] The book opens to black pages with white dots and small hearts; the left page has pink heart flaps tied with red ribbon, while the right page shows a large white heart with a red bow and a red label with mirrored text I LOVE U. [24-28] A hand pulls a tab on the red label to slide out a rainbow-colored strip with block letters, then pushes the slider back inside the pocket while the other hand stabilizes the page.

From 28-32s, a hand pulls a white card mechanism down on the right black page, revealing a cascade of small red hearts and vertical "Happy Birthday" text, then pushes it up to hide them and expose a red "I LOVE U" slider below. At 32-34s, the hand grasps the red ribbon on a large white heart cutout. From 34-40s, hands unfold this white heart upwards, transforming it into a flower-shaped card that displays "You Make Me Happy" alongside cup and heart drawings. The hands hold this open card steady. Finally, at 40-42s, the hands fold the flower card back down, obscuring the text and restoring the red heart cover over the black page, while the left page featuring pink heart flaps remains stationary on the floral tiled surface throughout.

[42-52] Hands manipulate a red flower-shaped cutout on the right page, revealing a white side with "I LOVE U" text on a petal before folding the red petals down. A red slider pocket with mirrored "I LOVE U" text is visible below. [52-56] The flower is closed to reveal a white heart cutout with a red center reading "Love" on the right page. Hands then move to the left page to untie a red ribbon securing two pink square flaps with heart motifs, while the right page remains stationary on the floral tiled surface.

[56-58] Hands wearing a silver watch and red band untie a red ribbon securing two pink square flaps on the left page of an open scrapbook. The right page displays a white heart cutout with a red center and a red slider pocket with mirrored text "I LOVE U" against a black background. [58-60] Hands pull the pink flaps apart to reveal a hidden sliding mechanism, extending a white strip with red text "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" horizontally. [60-62] A vertical cascade unfolds below the strip, revealing a white flap with "2 U", a red panel with a sketch, and a final white flap with a handwritten note. [62-68] Hands stabilize the extended cascade, displaying the red handwritten note "You fill my heart" on the bottom white flap, with the red panel visible above. [68-70] Hands hold the fully extended mechanism, showing the red sketch panel and handwritten note, while the right page remains stationary on the floral surface.

[70-76] Hands wearing a silver watch and red band push extended white and red flaps of a cascade mechanism back into pink square pockets on the left black page, then close bottom pink flaps. A white card displaying a drawing of red hearts and lines is lifted from a top pocket and slid back in. The right page features a large white heart cutout and red slider. [8-12] The hands cross the loose ribbon strands horizontally and tie a knot, tightening it to secure the book closed. [12-14] The right hand pulls the ribbon rightward, sliding the right purple flap to reveal a white vertical strip and a crescent moon design. [14-18] Hands hold the bottom corners while opening purple flaps with white dots to reveal a white card featuring vertical blue text reading HAPPY BIRTHDAY along the side margins and a central purple square with a white circle on a pink and white striped background. [18-20] The card is folded inward, closing the book to display the purple flaps and a loose horizontal red ribbon against the floral tiled surface. [20-24] The book opens to black pages with white dots and small hearts; the left page has pink heart flaps tied with red ribbon, while the right

[130-132] Hands retract a white card into a square on the left black page. [132-142] Hands wearing a silver watch and red band pull open the flaps of a pink diamond-shaped envelope on the bottom left page, revealing a central white square marked with a black plus sign. The left page features a black background with white dots and a pink gift box above. The right page displays pink hearts and "LOVE" text against a black background.

[142-148] Hands wearing a silver watch and red band maintain the open flaps of a pink diamond envelope on the left page, exposing a white square with a black plus sign against a black polka-dot background. The right page displays pink hearts and text on a black background. [148-152] The hands open a pink gift box structure on the left page, extracting and unfolding a pink card to reveal text segments "YOU" and "FOREVER". [152-154] The hands hold the pink card with "YOU" text near the bottom right edge, while the left page shows a closed pink diamond envelope with a white center below an open pink square frame. The scrapbook rests on a floral tiled surface.

[154-162] Hands wearing a silver watch and red band move a pink card with 'YOU' text from the center towards the bottom right edge. The scrapbook rests on floral tiles, displaying black pages with white dots, a pink gift box, and hearts. [162-164] Hands turn the page to reveal a spread with blue borders and black grid backgrounds. The left page shows a blue square containing a white heart, while the right page features a light blue card tied with a red ribbon. [164-166] The right hand touches the light blue card on the right page while the left hand rests on the bottom left corner. The pink card with 'YOU' text remains visible at the far right edge.

[166-176] Hands wearing a silver watch and red band lift a light blue card tied with a red ribbon from the scrapbook's right page, which has a black grid background. The card is unfolded to reveal a white central square featuring a blue ribbon illustration and a rectangular insert with an orange border. The card is held open above the scrapbook, which displays blue borders and a left page with a blue square containing a white heart design, while a pink card remains visible at the far right edge of the floral tiled surface. [176-178] The light blue card rests on the floral surface at the bottom right. Hands interact with the scrapbook's left page, manipulating a horizontal strip featuring pink candle shapes located above the blue square containing a white heart design.

recent_thinks.text: Hands pull a white rectangular card downwards from the bottom edge of the yellow square on the left page, fully extending a sliding mechanism. The right page remains static, displaying a closed yellow diamond envelope and circular element on a black checkered background, while the floral tiled surface is visible underneath.

Hands wearing a silver watch and red band open the left scrapbook page, revealing an inner black surface with a white rectangle and light blue shape. The page's front, displaying a pink candle slider, swings to the left. The right page stays static with a black grid pattern and red ribbon.

Hands touch the white strip featuring pink candle shapes on the open left flap of the scrapbook. This flap is swung to the left, revealing an inner black page with a white rectangle and light blue shape. The right page remains static, displaying a black grid pattern and red ribbon.

Hands wearing a silver watch and red band touch and adjust a horizontal strip featuring pink candle shapes on the upper left page of the open scrapbook. The left page flap is swung open, revealing inner elements, while the right page remains stationary with a black grid pattern and red ribbon against the floral tiled surface.

Hands wearing a silver watch and red band fold the left scrapbook page flap closed, covering the inner black surface. The flap features a horizontal strip with pink candle shapes. The right page remains stationary, displaying a black grid pattern and a red ribbon bow against the floral tiled background.
